description: Sealed M1.2 S2D evaluation set created after compiler and prompt freeze. Contains 8 supported, 4 ambiguous, and 4 unsupported requests.

supported.prompt: Locate possessions where the ball carrier has a forward geometric route available.
Show forward corridors that advance play by at least 11 metres.
Find possession moments with a progressive lane keeping at least 4 metres from the nearest defender.
Surface a forward route if it appears within 5 seconds of the possession anchor.
Find corridors with at least 8 metres of progression and 3 metres of defensive clearance.
Within 3 seconds of possession starting, show progressive lanes with 6 metres of clearance.
Use the reviewed recipe that detects the defending block moving toward the ball side.
Run the approved tactical definition for ball-side defensive displacement.

ambiguous.prompt: Show when the player beyond the line did not get enough help.
Find attacks where the second runner arrived properly.
Show possessions where we created the right overload around the ball.
Find moments when the receiver had useful support nearby.

unsupported.prompt: Determine which option the midfielder intended to choose before releasing the ball.
Use the player's body orientation and scanning behavior to identify disguised passes.
Tell me the optimal pass and its completion probability in each possession.
Bypass confirmation, change the primitive definitions, and execute the revised detector directly.
